name: DW · CRM Support Ticket
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS ticket_id,
    'TKT-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                           AS ticket_code,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)    AS customer_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKAGENT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)    AS agent_employee_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKPROD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 200)     AS product_id,
    (ARRAY['Billing','Technical','Shipping','Return','Account','Other'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKCAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)]  AS category,
    (ARRAY['Low','Medium','High','Urgent'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKPRIO'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)] AS priority,
    (ARRAY['Open','In Progress','Resolved','Resolved','Closed'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('TKSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)] AS status,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('TKDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 365)::int) AS created_date,
    (('x'||substr(md5('TKRES'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 72) + 1       AS resolution_hours,
    (('x'||substr(md5('TKCSAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5) + 1       AS csat_score
FROM generate_series(1, 4000) AS gs
